Name: AI Cost Monitor
Description: Show how much you spend on AI coding tools (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot and more) right on your Ulanzi Deck. One button per platform plus a Total. Cost data is read locally — no API keys needed. Cost calculation powered by the open-source codeburn (MIT).
Author: Narlei Moreira

Actions.Name: AI Cost Monitor
Actions.Tooltip: Show AI coding cost. Configure platform, period, and optional spending limit in the inspector.
